content:
- Completed story-12 task 03 execution. Added typed source-command auditing in `crates/runner/tests/support/e2e_integrity.rs`, routed post-setup source SQL through the wrapper-backed audited path, and exposed typed post-setup audit access from the default bootstrap harness.
- Strengthened the E2E integrity contract and the default long-lane live-update scenario so the suite now proves destination catch-up after setup happens without extra source bootstrap/admin/helper commands. Also fit composite and multi-mapping support to the shared audit owner and replaced fresh-per-harness Docker networks with a shared serialized E2E network to keep `make test-long` stable.
- All required lanes passed: `make check`, `make lint`, `make test`, and `make test-long`. Updated the task file to completed with `<passes>true</passes>`, checked off the plan, ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, and the next step is to commit and push all repo plus `.ralph` changes.
